team.name: Dr. Alejandro Gomez, DMD
team.bio: Over 15 years transforming smiles in South Beach. Specializes in ultra-thin porcelain veneers and full mouth reconstruction. Pioneer in 3D digital smile design.

team.name: Dr. Maria Rossi, DDS
team.bio: Platinum Invisalign Provider. Passionate about accelerated orthodontics using Propel technology.

services.name: Signature Porcelain Veneers
services.description: Custom-designed, ultra-thin porcelain veneers that require minimal prep. Digital preview included before treatment.

services.name: Laser Teeth Whitening
services.description: Advanced EpicX Laser Whitening. Brightens teeth up to 8 shades in just 45 minutes with zero sensitivity.

services.name: Invisalign Platinum
services.description: Comprehensive clear aligner therapy. Includes digital 3D scanning (no messy impressions) and complimentary teeth whitening.

services.name: Botox & Dermal Fillers
services.description: Complete your smile makeover with facial esthetics. Smooth fine lines and enhance lips.

services.name: Routine VIP Cleaning
services.description: Spa-like cleaning experience with noise-canceling headphones, Netflix, and a warm paraffin hand wax.

insurance.policy: Smiles R Us is an out-of-network provider for all insurances. We offer premium, uncompromised care and will gladly submit claims on your behalf for out-of-network reimbursement.

faq.question: Do you accept my insurance?
faq.answer: We are a fee-for-service cosmetic practice and do not contract directly with insurances. However, we can file out-of-network claims for your PPO plan!

faq.question: How long do veneers take?
faq.answer: Thanks to our in-house digital lab, you can get a complete set of custom veneers in just two visits over the course of one week.

faq.question: Do you see children?
faq.answer: Our practice focuses strictly on adult cosmetic and restorative dentistry (ages 16+). We would be happy to refer your children to an excellent local pediatric dentist.

policies.cancellation: We require 48 hours notice for cancellations. Late cancellations are subject to a $100 fee.
policies.payment: Payment is due in full at the time of service. We offer 0% financing for up to 24 months through CareCredit.
